archetype.name: Archer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Triple Shot at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Triple Shot
feat.text: You can quickly fire multiple shots with greater control. When you use Double Shot, you can make the attacks against the same target. You can add an additional action to Double Shot to make three ranged Strikes instead of two. If you do, the penalty is –4. All attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn’t increase until after you’ve made all of them.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
